sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 26:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 26:1
items.html: External means refined, and you find that the more it is external, the better it is and the more it is in equivalence of form with Ein Sof. (Inner Observation, Item 7)
